paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 187 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 178 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 37 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 5 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 52 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **30 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,250 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 38 days past due with 32 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 50 days past due with 32 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,446 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 28 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **65 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,123 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 9 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **34 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $44,883 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

289 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **251 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 46 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$98,745 in payments going out this week** across 51 tasks — make sure funds are available. $57,798 expected in from 6 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 1. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 10 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **65 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 79 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Clean — 4 tasks in progress. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 2. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 52 overdue (oldest: 17d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **30 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 32 overdue (oldest: 50d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 23 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 16. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 32 overdue (oldest: 38d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 28 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 9 overdue — oldest first. **34 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 43 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
